description: You are a Facility Manager auditing vendor performance using the SLA policy file at /home/ga/Desktop/SLA_Policy.txt. Audit the 6 Work Orders specified in the policy within OpenMaint (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/, admin/admin) to verify compliance with the 24-hour resolution deadline. Based on the 'Reported' and 'Resolved' timestamps in the Description field, prepend the appropriate tag to the existing description: '[SLA: COMPLIANT] ' for resolution within 24 hours, '[SLA: BREACHED] ' for resolution exceeding 24 hours, or '[SLA: EXEMPT] ' if the ticket is 'Waiting for Parts'. Do not tag tickets that lack a Resolved timestamp. Ensure the original description text remains intact after the prepended tag.
